item.title: Macs of Unusual Size 摘要
item.description:
Scott Knaster notes that the Big Mac is approximately 22 times larger than the little Mac, highlighting a significant size difference between the two products. This comparison is based on a link to an article titled 'Macs of Unusual Size' from Daring Fireball, dated March 30, 2026.
标签: hardware, Apple, Mac, size comparison, product design, tech news, consumer electronics, Daring Fireball, Scott Knaster

item.title: ‘The Brand Age’ 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses Paul Graham's essay on the mechanical watch industry, where he argues that a world defined only by brand is 'weird and bad.' The author disagrees, stating that the mechanical watch market is currently vibrant and fun, particularly due to independent brands like Baltic and Halios, rather than high-end luxury Swiss brands. The author also extends Graham's argument to the smartphone industry, noting that it is dominated by a single brand with competitors copying it, which they describe as truly 'bad and weird.'
标签: brand, mechanical watches, Paul Graham, consumer markets, independent brands, smartphones, industry analysis, luxury goods, market trends, essay critique

item.title: The Webs Digital Locks have Never had a Stronger Opponent 摘要
item.description:
The author benchmarks their JavaScript code protection against Claude, finding it takes 22 minutes and 170k tokens to crack a small sample. They argue LLMs are revolutionizing reverse engineering by drastically reducing the upfront effort, enabling tasks like deobfuscating code or extracting content from proprietary platforms in minutes instead of hours or days. This raises questions about the effectiveness of traditional protection schemes, as LLMs can handle minified, bundled, or obfuscated code with ease. The defense side struggles to keep up, as generating novel protections is harder to automate than offense, which only requires analyzing existing complexity.
标签: JavaScript, code protection, reverse engineering, LLM, Claude, obfuscation, security, AI, web development, automation

item.title: Pluralistic: Market participation is exhausting (30 Mar 2026) 摘要
item.description:
The article critiques the pervasive market ideology that frames all social interactions as competitive bargaining, arguing it's exhausting for those not inclined to constant haggling. It uses personal anecdotes about cognitive diversity—like hiring agents who enjoy negotiation—to highlight how society benefits from varied strengths. However, it warns against extending this logic to extremes, such as treating everything from kidneys to privacy as commodities, citing examples like Sheryl Sandberg and Donald Trump to illustrate the dangers of unchecked market thinking and 'revealed preferences' that justify exploitation.
标签: economics, market ideology, neurodiversity, cybernetics, bargaining, revealed preferences, social critique, cognitive diversity, ethics, personal anecdotes

item.title: HIBP Mega Update: Passkeys, k-Anonymity Searches, Massive Speed Enhancements and a Bulk Domain Verification API 摘要
item.description:
Have I Been Pwned (HIBP) has evolved from a hobby project to a large-scale service processing billions of compromised records annually. The article announces major updates including new subscription plans (Core, Pro, High RPM, Enterprise) to better serve diverse users from individuals to enterprises. Key features introduced are support for MSPs to monitor third-party domains, automated domain verification via DNS and email APIs, auto-verification of subdomains for Pro users, and k-anonymity searches for enhanced privacy in email lookups. These enhancements aim to improve scalability, privacy, and usability for organizations and managed service providers.
标签: security, data-breach, privacy, API, cybersecurity, domain-verification, k-anonymity, MSP, authentication, compliance

item.title: Continuous, Continuous, Continuous 摘要
item.description:
The article argues that traditional staged software development (design, coding, testing, integration, release) is ill-suited for today's fast-paced environment. It advocates for a continuous, iterative approach where these stages blur into micro feedback loops, enabling frequent updates and adaptation to changing requirements. This philosophy, central to code craft, emphasizes the ability to evolve software continuously in response to customer and world changes.
标签: software development, continuous integration, agile, code craft, feedback loops, iterative development, DevOps, software engineering, collaboration, evolutionary design

item.title: datasette-llm 0.1a3 摘要
item.description:
datasette-llm 0.1a3 introduces purpose-specific configuration, allowing users to restrict which LLMs are available for particular plugins. This feature addresses issue #3 and enhances control over model usage within the Datasette ecosystem.
标签: datasette, llm, release, configuration, plugin, open-source, python, database, ai, tools

item.title: [Sponsor] Material Security 摘要
item.description:
Material Security addresses the noise problem in security teams by unifying cloud workspace security for email, files, and accounts into a single platform. It augments native gaps in Google and Microsoft without enterprise bloat, enabling teams to focus on strategy rather than manual tasks like phishing remediation and file audits.
标签: security, cloud, workspace, SecOps, email, files, accounts, Google, Microsoft, enterprise

item.title: Quoting Georgi Gerganov 摘要
item.description:
Georgi Gerganov explains that local models often fail with coding agents due to issues in the software stack, not the models themselves. Problems include fragile harnesses, chat template intricacies, prompt construction errors, and inference bugs. The fragmented development across different components makes it difficult to create a stable, consolidated system, leading to subtle, hard-to-detect failures in the chain from task input to result.
标签: local-llms, coding-agents, generative-ai, ai, llms, software-stack, inference, prompt-engineering, model-harness, fragility
